positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical pattern of bioluminescent flora and cosmic elements. The composition should be central and impactful, suitable for a large graphic apparel print. Style should blend Neo-Art Nouveau with geometric vector illustration, emphasizing clean lines and strong, graphic silhouettes. The scene depicts glowing jungle leaves, abstract celestial rings, and stylized geometric fauna. Dominant color palette: Deep indigo and sapphire blue background, contrasted sharply with neon cyan, electric magenta, and glowing lime green accents. Use dramatic edge lighting (rim lighting) to outline all subject matter, giving the print a vibrant, ethereal glow. High contrast, maximal detail, flawless graphic quality.
